description_long: This is a stylized, blocky biplane with a predominantly purple color scheme and yellow geometric patterns on the upper wings. The airplane features two stacked wings, a single propeller at the nose, and a tail with a vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The cockpit is centrally located and appears to be open, with a light blue windshield or canopy. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a small tail wheel, all fixed and visible beneath the fuselage. The propeller is rendered in a contrasting orange and gray, adding a distinct visual element to the front of the aircraft.
description: A purple, blocky biplane with yellow wing patterns, a front propeller, and an open cockpit with a blue windshield.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dual wings, central propeller, and open cockpit with blue windshield.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the stacked wings, fixed landing gear, and tail structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, both wings, and the full span of the horizontal stabilizers.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the propeller, cockpit, and landing gear from the opposite angle.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two straight, mid-mounted wings stacked vertically; no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two fixed main wheels and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open cockpit with a single seat and a blue windshield.
